Reviewed and cleaned up the Dev/Test backend variable groups.

Removed duplicate/unused variables:
- client_id
- client_secret
- DEDIASFTPPublicKey

Created the backend variable groups for:
- Terraform ELZ UAT Backend
- Terraform ELZ Prod Backend

Updated the UAT/Prod pipeline sections to include the required parameters:
- noProxy
- clientId
- clientSecret
- dediaSftpPrivateKey

For UAT/Prod noProxy, I included the known Terraform backend storage host first. Runtime storage host values can be updated later once confirmed during validation.
